movie.synopsis: Kalapatthar (2024) Shankar, who serves in the Indian Army. In his hometown of Mudalpur, a statue is erected, leading to a series of confusion. Shankar returns to the town, facing the dilemma of whether to safeguard the idol or quell the unrest among the people.
